subject: An armored humanoid figure levitates before a grand official building, holding a ledger or book, surrounded by magical golden light
description: A figure in blue-teal trousers, a grey fitted jacket, and a utility harness with pouches levitates slightly above the ground in a wide stance. The figure holds a flat book or ledger in one hand and extends the other hand outward. Golden magical energy radiates as streaks and glints from the corners of the frame, suggesting a flying or levitation ability. The background is a grand, ornate building with cream-gold architecture, arched windows, and manicured trees — an institutional or governmental setting. The figure's posture is confident and bureaucratic, not combative.
foreground: Levitating figure in official attire holding a ledger, golden magical streaks
background: Grand cream-and-gold institutional building, arched windows, manicured greenery
emotion: Composed, authoritative, professional — not aggressive but clearly empowered
